name: tier1_doc_number_padding_variants
description: Tier 1 LIKE-expansion path: Evidence.doc_number is the canonical USD00022222 but the Objective guidance cites the un-padded form 'USD-22222'. Pins that _objectives_mentioning_doc OR's the canonical + variant forms across implementation_guidance + assessment_procedures so trailing-digit suffix variants still match. A regression that drops the variant expansion would zero this out.

objectives.implementation_guidance: Per USD-22222 the account baseline applies.
objectives.assessment_procedures: Examine the policy referenced as USD-22222.
